hero.title: Lookbook
hero.intro: SERA NORR presents projects as a starting point for bespoke stone furniture. You choose material and base form. We refine size, detail and finish.

terra.name: TERRA
terra.subtitle: Travertine
terra.description: Travertine with calm tones and natural layering. Designs with gentle strength, clear lines and a calm presence.
terra.editorialCopy: Italian travertine with warm, honeyed tones and characteristic texture. Every piece is made to measure according to your dimensions and form preferences.
terra.longDescription: The TERRA collection draws from the ancient warmth of Italian travertine, stone formed over millennia from mineral springs, carrying within it the memory of water. Each piece reveals the characteristic pitting and honeyed tones that make travertine one of nature's most expressive materials.

vanta.name: VANTA
vanta.subtitle: Calacatta Viola
vanta.description: Calacatta Viola with rich veins and pronounced contrast. Clean forms that let the material speak without excess.
vanta.editorialCopy: Calacatta Viola with violet veining and a luminous white surface. Every piece is made to measure according to your dimensions and form preferences.
vanta.longDescription: VANTA celebrates Calacatta Viola, among the rarest and most dramatic marbles quarried from the Apuan Alps. Its bold violet veining against luminous white creates pieces that are as much sculpture as furniture.

other.name: Other stone types
other.subtitle: Material curation on request
other.description: For projects with a specific colour tone or stone type, we select materials beyond our standard range. Verde Alpi, Nero Marquina and other stone types, chosen based on drawing and character.

pricing.title: Bespoke on request
pricing.subtitle: Every SERA NORR piece is made to measure. The price depends on stone choice, dimensions, thickness, edge finish, base and delivery/installation. After a brief intake you receive a clear quote.
pricing.note: Calacatta Viola & rare stones on request. Prices incl. VAT. Delivery & installation included within NL & BE; elsewhere on request.

process.title: From lookbook to proposal

step1.title: Choose a project + base form
step1.description: Select material and furniture type as starting point.

step2.title: Define size + finish
step2.description: Share your desired dimensions and finish preferences.

process.microcopy: First response from the atelier within 24–48 hours.

collections.customDescription: Every piece can be customized. Discuss your vision with our atelier.

bespoke.subtitle: Bespoke Atelier
bespoke.title: Your Vision, Realized
bespoke.description: Every space has its own language. Our bespoke service translates your vision into sculptural permanence, pieces designed for one space alone, crafted with materials chosen for you, and built to last generations.
bespoke.step1Description: We begin with a conversation about your space, your needs, and your aesthetic vision. Share inspiration, dimensions, and dreams.
bespoke.step2Description: Our atelier develops initial sketches and material proposals. We source rare stones and present options tailored to your project.
bespoke.step3Description: Refined drawings and 3D visualizations. Every proportion is considered, every detail refined.
bespoke.step4Description: Your piece is crafted by selected artisans. We document the process, keeping you connected to your object's creation.
bespoke.step5Description: White-glove delivery and professional installation. Your piece finds its home.
bespoke.materialsDescription: Our atelier works with an ever-evolving library of exceptional natural stones. From rare marbles quarried in limited quantities to classic travertine, we source materials that elevate your piece beyond the ordinary.
bespoke.naturalStoneList: Travertine, Calacatta Viola, Verde Alpi, Nero Marquina
bespoke.metalAccentsList: Brushed brass, blackened steel, bronze patina
bespoke.craftsmanshipDescription: Every Sera Norr piece is designed in our Dutch studio. We combine traditional stone-working techniques with contemporary precision, collaborating with selected artisans worldwide.
bespoke.leadTimeDescription: Average lead time: 12–16 weeks (depending on stone choice and location). We believe in craftsmanship that cannot be rushed.
bespoke.formVisionPlaceholder: Describe your wishes: type of furniture, dimensions, material preferences...
bespoke.formSuccessDescription: Thank you for your interest. Our atelier will be in touch within 48 hours.

about.subtitle: The Atelier
about.title: Form Follows Material
about.description: Sera Norr was founded on a singular belief: that exceptional furniture begins with profound respect for material. We don't impose form upon stone. We discover it.
about.philosophyDescription1: In an age of disposability, we create for permanence. Each Sera Norr piece is designed to be passed between generations, its beauty deepening with time and use.
about.philosophyDescription2: Our approach is unhurried. We spend weeks selecting materials, months in development, and refuse to rush craftsmanship. The result is furniture that transcends trend.
about.value1Description: We source the world's rarest stones, spending months finding the perfect slab.
about.value2Description: Every piece exists at the intersection of furniture and art object.
about.value3Description: Designed in the Netherlands, executed with selected artisans worldwide.
about.value4Description: Objects designed to outlast trends, meant for generational inheritance.
about.value5Description: The courage to leave out, to simplify, to trust the material.
about.value6Description: Deep partnership with clients to realize singular visions.
about.studioDescription: SERA NORR is an online atelier. Through personal remote guidance, we walk you through every step of the design process.

materials.title: Materials
materials.subtitle: Natural Stone Selection
materials.description: We work with a carefully curated material palette. Each stone type has unique properties that define the character of the final piece.

dining.title: Dining tables
dining.description: Central pieces for daily use and special moments.

coffee.title: Coffee tables
coffee.description: Sculptural elements that anchor the space.

console.title: Consoles
console.description: Refined accents for entryway or living room.

philosophy.title: Material as starting point
philosophy.description1: At SERA NORR, every design begins with the material itself. We select stones for colour, veining and structure, letting these properties guide the design.
philosophy.description2: Variation is not a flaw but a feature. Each slab is unique, making every piece that leaves our atelier an original.

cta.title: Looking for a specific material?
cta.description: We also work with other stone types on request. Contact us to discuss possibilities.

travertine.name: Travertine
travertine.subtitle: Italian Travertine
travertine.intro: Travertine is a sedimentary rock formed from thermal springs. Its characteristic pitting and warm tones make it one of nature's most expressive stones.
travertine.description: Italian travertine has been used in architecture and design for millennia. The material has a natural warmth and texture that perfectly suits contemporary interiors.

care.title: Care
care.description: Travertine requires regular sealing and careful cleaning. Avoid acidic products and use pH-neutral cleaners.

faq.question: Is travertine suitable for daily use?
faq.answer: Yes, when properly sealed, travertine is excellent for daily use. The natural patina that develops adds character.

faq.question: How do I maintain travertine?
faq.answer: Weekly cleaning with pH-neutral soap and annual sealing keep your travertine in optimal condition.

faq.question: Can stains be removed?
faq.answer: Most stains can be removed with proper treatment. We advise contacting us for stubborn stains.

calacatta-viola.name: Calacatta Viola
calacatta-viola.subtitle: Rare Italian Marble
calacatta-viola.intro: Calacatta Viola is one of the rarest and most dramatic marbles in the world, quarried from the Apuan Alps in Italy.
calacatta-viola.description: The bold violet veins against a luminous white background make this marble a true work of art. Each piece is unique due to the natural variation in veining.

care.title: Care
care.description: Calacatta Viola requires careful handling. Regular sealing and immediate cleaning of spills preserve its beauty.

faq.question: Why is Calacatta Viola so rare?
faq.answer: The marble comes from just one quarry in the Apuan Alps. Extraction is limited and global demand is high.

faq.question: Is every slab different?
faq.answer: Yes, each slab has a unique vein pattern. We carefully select slabs that complement each other for larger projects.

faq.question: How do I protect the surface?
faq.answer: Professional sealing at installation and annual treatment protect the surface from stains and wear.
